_comment: Deterministic invariant gates for obs-projects-plus. Blocks @ts-ignore additions and direct commits to main/master. Reminds on test runs.

PreToolUse.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$line = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($line -match 'git\s+commit') { $b = git -C 'c:/Users/Park/OBSv1.0/obs-projects-plus' rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and ($b -eq 'main' -or $b -eq 'master')) { Write-Output '{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"BLOCKED: Direct commits to main/master are forbidden. Create a feature branch first: git checkout -b feat/<name>\"}}'; exit 2 } } exit 0"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "$line = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($line -match 'git\s+push.*\b(main|master)\b') { Write-Output '{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"BLOCKED: Push to main/master is reserved for the user.\"}}'; exit 2 } exit 0"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "$line = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($line -match 'git\s+(reset\s+--hard|push\s+(--force|-f)|clean\s+-(d|f))') { Write-Output '{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"BLOCKED: Destructive git operations require explicit user execution.\"}}'; exit 2 } exit 0"

PostToolUse.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$line = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($line -match 'npm\s+test\b' -or $line -match 'npm\s+run\s+test') { Write-Output '{\"systemMessage\":\"Baseline reminder: 139 suites / 2099 tests must PASS. Any deviation requires CONTEXT.md update via context-manager.\"}' } exit 0"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "$line = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); if ($line -match '@ts-ignore' -and $line -match 'src[\\\\/]') { Write-Output '{\"decision\":\"block\",\"systemMessage\":\"INVARIANT VIOLATED: @ts-ignore is forbidden in src/. Fix the types properly. Revert this edit.\"}'; exit 2 } exit 0"
